# GLOHIB.AI - Structure Analysis Report

**Generated:** 2026-03-09 12:50:00

---

## Executive Summary

GLOHIB.AI is an **AI-Powered Global Health Internship Matching Platform** built with a **microservices architecture**. The project uses **Next.js 14** for the frontend, **Go (Gin)** and **Python (FastAPI)** for backend services, **PostgreSQL 16 with pgvector** for the database, and **Docker Compose** for container orchestration.

**Project Health Status:** ✅ **HEALTHY** - Ready for UI/UX Refactor

---

## Directory Structure

```
glohibai/
├── frontend/
│   └── web/                          # Next.js 14 Application
│       ├── src/
│       │   ├── app/                  # App Router pages
│       │   │   ├── layout.tsx        # Root layout
│       │   │   ├── page.tsx          # Landing page
│       │   │   ├── login/
│       │   │   ├── register/
│       │   │   └── dashboard/
│       │   ├── components/           # React components
│       │   ├── hooks/                # Custom React hooks
│       │   └── lib/                  # Utilities, API clients
│       ├── .next/                    # Next.js build output
│       ├── node_modules/
│       ├── public/
│       ├── package.json
│       ├── tailwind.config.js
│       ├── tsconfig.json
│       └── next.config.js
│
├── services/                         # Microservices (10 total)
│   ├── identity-service/             # Go (Gin) - Auth & OAuth
│   ├── student-service/              # Go (Gin) - Student profiles
│   ├── internship-service/           # Go (Gin) - Internship listings
│   ├── assessment-service/           # Go (Gin) - Assessments
│   ├── recommendation-service/       # Python (FastAPI) - AI matching
│   ├── scoring-service/              # Python (FastAPI) - AI scoring
│   ├── video-service/                # Node.js (Express) - Video processing
│   └── [legacy folders]              # assessment-svc, identity-svc, etc.
│
├── database/
│   ├── migrations/                   # SQL migration files (001-008)
│   └── schemas/
│
├── docker/
│   └── init_postgres.sql
│
├── docs/
│   ├── api/
│   ├── architecture/
│   ├── discovery/                    # [NEW] Due diligence reports
│   ├── status-reports/               # [NEW] Build status reports
│   └── backups/                      # [NEW] Backup storage
│
├── scripts/
│   └── test_all_services.ps1
│
├── docker-compose.yml                # Main orchestration file
├── .env                              # Environment variables
├── .env.docker                       # Docker environment template
├── package.json                      # Root package (scripts only)
├── tsconfig.json                     # Root TypeScript config
└── requirements.txt                  # Python dependencies
```

## Framework Detection

### Frontend Framework
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Framework** | Next.js 14.2.3 (App Router) |
| **React Version** | 18.3.1 |
| **Routing** | App Router (file-based) |
| **Rendering** | Server Components + Client Components |
| **Build Tool** | Turbopack (via Next.js) |

### Backend Runtimes
| Service | Language | Framework | Port |
|---------|----------|-----------|------|
| Identity | Go 1.21 | Gin | 8080, 50051 |
| Student | Go 1.21 | Gin | 8082 |
| Internship | Go 1.21 | Gin | 8083 |
| Assessment | Go 1.21 | Gin | 8084, 50054 |
| Recommendation | Python 3.11 | FastAPI | 8007 |
| Scoring | Python 3.11 | FastAPI | 8008 |
| Video | Node.js 20 | Express | 4000 |

### Database
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Primary** | PostgreSQL 16 (pgvector/pgvector:pg16) |
| **Vector Extension** | pgvector (for AI embeddings) |
| **Caching** | Redis 7 (redis:7-alpine) |
| **Object Storage** | MinIO (S3-compatible) |

### Styling Approach
| Attribute | Value |
|-----------|-------|
| **Primary** | Tailwind CSS 3.4.19 |
| **Dark Mode** | Class-based (`.dark`) |
| **CSS Variables** | HSL color scales |
| **Component Library** | shadcn/ui patterns (custom implementation) |
| **Icons** | Lucide React |

### UI Libraries Detected
| Library | Version | Purpose |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Framer Motion | 11.18.2 | Animations |
| Zustand | 4.5.7 | State management |
| React Hook Form | 7.71.2 | Form handling |
| Zod | 3.25.76 | Schema validation |
| TanStack Query | 5.90.21 | Data fetching |
| Axios | 1.13.6 | HTTP client |
| Socket.IO Client | 4.8.3 | Real-time |

| Jest | ❌ Not installed |
| Vitest | ❌ Not installed |
| Cypress | ❌ Not installed |
| Playwright | ❌ Not installed |

## Database & Migrations

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `001_create_users.sql` | Users table |
| `002_create_profiles.sql` | Student/employer profiles |
| `003_create_internships.sql` | Internship listings |
| `004_create_indexes.sql` | Performance indexes |
| `005_create_applications.sql` | Application tracking |
| `006_create_assessments.sql` | Assessment workflow |
| `007_create_vectors.sql` | Vector embeddings |
| `008_seed_data.sql` | Sample data |

### Schema Location
- **Primary:** `database/migrations/`
- **Schemas:** `database/schemas/` (empty, legacy)
- **Init Script:** `docker/init_postgres.sql`

# Infrastructure

## Recommendations for UI/UX Refactor

### Immediate Actions
1. **Upgrade to Next.js 15** for RSC improvements
2. **Upgrade to Tailwind CSS 4** for new features
3. **Install shadcn/ui** for component library
4. **Add Radix UI** for accessible primitives
5. **Implement design tokens** for theming

### Medium Priority
1. Add ESLint + Prettier strict config
2. Implement comprehensive testing (Jest + React Testing Library)
3. Add Storybook for component documentation
4. Implement accessibility audit (axe-core)
5. Add performance monitoring (Lighthouse CI)

### Long Term
1. Add visual regression testing (Chromatic)
2. Implement analytics tracking
3. Add error monitoring (Sentry)
4. Implement A/B testing framework
